author: chasebank87
description: Enables you to store AI prompts as patterns and run them seemlessly with most providers.

manifest.author: Chasebank87
manifest.description: Mesh AI prompt manager and gererator
manifest.name: Mesh AI

name: Mesh AI

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added yt-dlp support for more reliable transcript fetching. The path can be set in the plugin settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed an issue where patterns would not download from the Fabric repo because the patterns have been moved.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minor bug fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Version: 1.2.7

### New Features:
1. Added right click context menu item (Mesh AI: Process Selection)


### Previous Features:
1. Openrouter
3. Change model from UI
4. Added better responsiveness for smaller screens
5. Added LMStudio provider
6. Added notice in meshview when the default provider is not configured
7. Analyzes the current note for suggested backlinks
8. Allows creation of the backlinks using a selected workflow in settings
9. Allows linking to already created notes that may fit the backlinks context
10. This feature is locked to OpenRouter for now due to the need of the new o1 reasoning models
- o1-mini can be used to save money but it is out performed drastically compared to o1-preview
11. Added Mesh Pathways (trigger from command pallete) BETA


### Bug Fixed:
1. Folder paths allowed backslashes, we now replace with forward slashes automatically
2. Youtube link detection on workflows
3. Meshview displaying only when openai key was entered (now only the default provider key must be entered)
5. Made it more clear for user to know which providers are not yet supported

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Version: 1.2.6

### New Features:
1. Added Mesh Pathways (trigger from command pallete)
 - Analyzes the current note for suggested backlinks
 - Allows creation of the backlinks using a selected workflow in settings
 - Allows linking to already created notes that may fit the backlinks context
 - This feature is locked to OpenRouter for now due to the need of the new o1 reasoning models
     * o1-mini can be used to save money but it is out performed drastically compared to o1-preview

### Previous Features:
1. Openrouter
3. Change model from UI
4. Added better responsiveness for smaller screens
5. Added LMStudio provider
6. Added notice in meshview when the default provider is not configured



### Bug Fixed:
1. Folder paths allowed backslashes, we now replace with forward slashes automatically
2. Youtube link detection on workflows
3. Meshview displaying only when openai key was entered (now only the default provider key must be entered)
5. Made it more clear for user to know which providers are not yet supported

releases.description:
# Initial Pre Release

**Version**: 1.0.7
- Changes requested by Obsidian
   - Bundle particles.js
   - Use requestUrl instead of fetch
   - Create new leafs instead of detaching leafs
